gameStartRoutine.note: Convert StartingCities option to a number of starting temples
Pick numCities random temple tiles to start face-up

loopRoutine.note: Deal each player their 4 special tiles

clickRoutine.header: Add this many points to your score:

clickRoutine.note: Sanity check / typo avoidance 1 of 2: only add value if it is an integer

thenRoutine.note: Sanity check / typo avoidance 2 of 2: only add value if it is a three-digit number

label-guide.text:
0 pts
6 pts / 3 pts
12 pts / 6 pts
20 pts / 10 pts
30 pts / 15 pts

info.name: Mesoamerica
info.attribution:
Game layout, library image, and scripting by Robin Harn, released to the Public Domain under CC0.

The following graphics are from http://www.magnific.com and are used under the Magnific License:
* https://www.magnific.com/icon/hexagon_13093120
* https://www.magnific.com/icon/pyramid_1201800
* https://www.magnific.com/free-vector/snake-hidden-jungle_19713063.htm

All crop icons and tile icons are from Google Noto Color Emoji and are used under the SIL Open Font License: https://fonts.google.com/noto/specimen/Noto+Color+Emoji
info.description: Plant crops and build cities to help civilization thrive in ancient Mesoamerica.
info.helpText:
* If playing at 3p, manually choose one section of the board to omit by toggling the map color icons

* If playing at 2p, manually choose two sections of the board to omit by toggling the map color icons
